commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves server-derived official owner metadata in skill and package detail responses, extends the package API schema, and renders the compact Official badge in plugin detail owner metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main uses toPublicPublisher for skill and package detail owners, so owner.official is not computed for the affected detail surfaces; the PR body also describes local seeded route checks for the reported pages.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because no actionable patch defect was found; this should proceed through normal maintainer review and CI.

target.title: fix: show official owner badges on detail pages
target.body:
## Summary
- Preserve computed `owner.official` on skill detail owner responses, including the reported `steipete` member-owned skill page.
- Preserve `owner.official` through package detail queries and the `/api/v1/packages/:name` response schema.
- Render the compact Official badge in the plugin detail Owner metadata row.

## Validation
- `bun run test convex/skills.public.test.ts`
- `bun run test convex/packages.public.test.ts`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/package-detail-route.test.tsx`
- `bun run test convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts packages/schema/src/schemas.test.ts`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run lint`
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`

## Local UI Check
Patched dev Convex was seeded with the exact reported routes, then checked locally at `390x844`, `768x1024`, and `1440x900`:

| Route | Result |
| --- | --- |
| `/steipete/codex-owner-move-debug-1778257045` | title Official tag present; owner compact Official badge present; no horizontal overflow |
| `/plugins/@openclaw/whatsapp` | title Official tag present; owner compact Official badge present; no horizontal overflow |

The local Playwright check reported no console errors after ignoring the existing dev-only theme hydration warning.
target.author: jesse-merhi
